zh.lifeSummary: 當Theobald de Valoignes Lord of Parham於大約1100年出生在英國素福爾可帕哈姆時，他的父親Sir Robert 'Hamo' de Valoignes de Parham21歲，母親de Valoignes de Parham21歲。他於1125年與Helewise de Valenis結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1135年在他的家鄉享年36歲，埋葬在英國肯特坎特布瑞坎特布瑞 凱德拉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Theobald de Valoignes Lord of Parham于大约1100年出生在英国素福爾可帕哈姆时，他的父亲Sir Robert 'Hamo' de Valoignes de Parham21岁，母亲de Valoignes de Parham21岁。他于1125年与Helewise de Valenis结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1135年在他的家乡享年36岁，埋葬在英国肯特坎特布瑞坎特布瑞 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Theobald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from þeud ‘people, race’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. The first element was altered under the influence of Greek theos ‘god’. This name was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Theobald de Valoignes Lord of Parham was born about 1100, in Parham, Suffolk, England, his father, Sir Robert 'Hamo' de Valoignes de Parham, was 21 and his mother, de Valoignes de Parham, was 21. He married Helewise de Valenis in 1125. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 7 daughters. He died in 1135, in his hometown, at the age of 36, and was buried in Canterbury Cathedral, Canterbury, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Theobald de Valoignes Lord of Parham est né environ 1100, à Parham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert 'Hamo' de Valoignes de Parham, avait 21 ans et sa mère, de Valoignes de Parham, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Helewise de Valenis en 1125. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé en 1135, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterré à Canterbury Cathedral, Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Theobald de Valoignes Lord of Parham um 1100 in Parham, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert 'Hamo' de Valoignes de Parham 21 und seine Mutter de Valoignes de Parham 21. Er hat 1125 Helewise de Valenis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb 1135 im Alter von 36 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Canterbury Cathedral, Canterbury, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Theobald de Valoignes Lord of Parham è nato il circa 1100 nel Parham, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert 'Hamo' de Valoignes de Parham, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, de Valoignes de Parham, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Helewise de Valenis nel 1125. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 7 figlie. Morì nel 1135, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 36 anni, e fu sepolto a Canterbury Cathedral, Canterbury, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Theobald de Valoignes Lord of Parhamが約1100年にイギリススフォルクパーハムで生まれた時，父Sir Robert 'Hamo' de Valoignes de Parhamは21歳，母de Valoignes de Parhamは21歳であった。1125年にHelewise de Valenisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1135年に故郷で36歳で死去し，イギリスケントカンテルブリーカンテルブリー カスエドラルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Theobald de Valoignes Lord of Parham(이)가 대략 1100년 영국 수폴크 파람에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert 'Hamo' de Valoignes de Parham(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 de Valoignes de Parham(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1125년 Helewise de Valenis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1135년 그의 고향에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 캉르버이 캉르버이 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

mn.Helmsley, Yorkshire, England: Helmsley, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Theobald de Valoignes Lord of Parham nasceu aproximadamente 1100, em Parham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert 'Hamo' de Valoignes de Parham, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, de Valoignes de Parham, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Helewise de Valenis em 1125. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1135, em sua cidade natal, com 36 anos, e foi sepultado em Canterbury Cathedral, Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Theobald de Valoignes Lord of Parham родился около 1100 г. в местности парам, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert 'Hamo' de Valoignes de Parham было 21 год, а матери, которую звали de Valoignes de Parham, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Helewise de Valenis в 1125 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер в 1135 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 36 лет и был похоронен в местности кантирбури кэтедраль, кантирбури, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Theobald de Valoignes Lord of Parham nació aproximadamente 1100, en Parham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert 'Hamo' de Valoignes de Parham, tenía 21 años y su mamá, de Valoignes de Parham, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Helewise de Valenis en 1125. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió en 1135, en su pueblo, a la edad de 36 años, y fue sepultado en Canterbury Cathedral, Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra.
